text: the motion blur on the transitions actually looks pretty clean
is this using a custom renderer or just standard web canvas?
it's webgl. good luck getting that performance in a standard dom layout without a massive headache.
oh god don't remind me of the reflow issues
wait i thought they switched over to canvas for the heavy lifting? i heard the dom approach was hitting a wall.
the wall is real. you can only animate so many div elements before the browser starts choking on the paint cycles.
lol this hit home. my last project turned into a slideshow the moment i added a blur effect.
fair point but the accessibility on canvas is still a nightmare if you aren't careful
yeah that's the trade-off. pretty visuals vs actually being usable for everyone.
i just want it to look cool
anyway the easing curves in the demo feel a bit stiff? maybe just me.
